context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct variance classification thresholds (dual absolute+percentage for 'material', percentage-only for 'notable'), the correct budget utilization alert thresholds (pace_ratio > 1.20 triggers overspend, pace_ratio < 0.50 at mid-month triggers underspend), severity assignment logic, and alert sorting.

checklist.name: Material variance threshold
checklist.description: variance_flag = 'material' when BOTH percentage > 10% AND absolute value > $10,000

checklist.name: Notable variance threshold
checklist.description: variance_flag = 'notable' when percentage > 5% (and not already classified as material)

checklist.name: Within tolerance label
checklist.description: variance_flag = 'within_tolerance' for all other rows (not 'ok', 'normal', or other label)

checklist.name: Variance absolute calculation
checklist.description: variance_absolute is computed as actual_amount MINUS budget_amount (actuals minus budget, not budget minus actuals)

checklist.name: Overspend alert trigger
checklist.description: An overspend alert is generated when pace_ratio > 1.20 (where pace_ratio = actual_utilization_pct / expected_utilization_pct)

checklist.name: Underspend alert trigger
checklist.description: An underspend alert is generated when pace_ratio < 0.50 AND expected_utilization_pct > 0.50 (i.e., after mid-month only)

checklist.name: Warning vs critical severity
checklist.description: Overspend severity is 'warning' when pace_ratio is between 1.20 and 1.40, and 'critical' when pace_ratio >= 1.40

checklist.name: Alert sort order
checklist.description: Returned alert list is sorted with 'critical' alerts first, before 'warning' and 'info'

checklist.name: Paid Social flagged in sample
checklist.description: sample_alerts.json contains an alert for Paid Social (pace_ratio = (85/50)/(20/30) = 2.55, which is critical)

checklist.name: Influencer flagged in sample
checklist.description: sample_alerts.json contains an underspend alert for Influencer (pace_ratio = (5/30)/(20/30) = 0.25, below 0.50 threshold at mid-month)
